name: HP Security Stack Detected
recommendation: Keep / Review as a complete stack
reason: Multiple HP security components are installed. Review the stack as a coordinated system rather than removing individual components without understanding dependencies.

all.pattern: HP Wolf|HP Sure Click|HP Client Security|HP Security

name: HP Platform Support Components Detected
reason: HP platform components may support hotkeys, firmware, BIOS communication, thermal behavior, audio, or device-specific functionality.

all.pattern: HP Hotkey|HP System Event|HP Software Framework|HP BIOS|HP Firmware

name: Docker Installed with Virtual Machine Platform Disabled
reason: Docker-related software was detected while VirtualMachinePlatform appears disabled. Docker Desktop using WSL 2 may not operate correctly in this configuration.

name: Docker Virtualization Support Detected
reason: Docker-related software and the Virtual Machine Platform feature were both detected, indicating that core WSL 2 virtualization support is available.

name: Microsoft Store Installation Stack Present
reason: Microsoft Store and Desktop App Installer are both present. Together they support Store applications, MSIX packages, and winget-related installation workflows.

name: Microsoft Store Package Not Detected
reason: No Microsoft Store package was found in the available Appx inventory. Store applications and related update workflows may be unavailable.

name: Intel Driver and Companion Software Detected
reason: Intel drivers and Intel companion software were both detected. The software may provide configuration, diagnostics, or update functionality for installed Intel hardware.

name: NVIDIA Driver and Companion Software Detected
reason: NVIDIA driver and companion software components were detected together.

name: WSL Virtualization Platform Enabled
recommendation: Keep if WSL or virtualization is used
reason: VirtualMachinePlatform is enabled, providing virtualization infrastructure commonly used by WSL 2 and container tooling.

name: Telnet Client Enabled
reason: The legacy Telnet client is enabled. Keep it only when required for a specific administrative or compatibility workflow.
